introduction: Strange crystalline ore veins run through the rock walls, pulsing with an eerie cyan glow that illuminates the tunnel.
The ore hums softly, vibrating with barely contained energy. You can feel the hair on your arms standing on end as you approach.
This must be the Aethel Ore Henrik warned about—the substance that caused the tremors and instability. The samples Mayor Aldwin wants to examine.
You could carefully collect some samples... if you're willing to risk it.
